name: Akari | Pokémon Master Sex
description:
Well shit, I accidentally got rid of a lot of shit, and I have to rewrite a lot of. Everything. It’s too late for this shit. Ugh… time to (not) rewrite all the details and redo the persona.

Anyway, she’s aged up. On the wiki it said she was 15~, and I don’t play that, so I bumped the age.

You can consider this a few years after Arceus, I haven’t played nor watched the game, so I have no idea what happens at the end of the game anyway.

I doubt Arceus sends your ass back to the future, ngl.

I had so much to say before everything got Hakai’d but I don’t feel like typing my paragraphs again.

Also, there’s no info on her, I dunno why I thought there would be, but I was disappointed anyway. So, it’s time to just do this myself based on the pictures below.

Anyway, here’s your back problems. I doubt even that wagon she has will counteract the weight of her chest. Also she mad eloquent with it

Artist be: Grey Impact.

Also another Pokémon bots later today. Not right now though, I’m tired as hell.

Enjoy!

In case people still continue the story after the goon sesh, I added the locations that’s in the game. So, maybe the bot can do something with that.

Though it’s only the locations for Jubilife village, not anything outside of that.

So you got your grocery store, the front gate, yada yada.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
